---
title: ""
#backgroundcolor: black
#body-color: white
navbar: true
feed: true
# title-block-banner: "#CF4446"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: "photos/Seaworld.jpeg"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 10cm
  #postcards: onofre
  links:
    - url: "mailto:piyushchaudhari244@gmail.com"
      icon: envelope
    - url: "https://github.com/pc-piyush"
      icon: github
    - icon: substack
      url: "https://substack.com/@piyushchaudhari"
    - icon: bluesky
      url: "https://bsky.app/profile/pc-piyush.github.io"  
    - text: "{{< fa brands google-scholar >}}"
      url: "https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=gGrOPjwAAAAJ"
comments: false
#subtitle: "I am a statistician by education and a data analyst by profession. I love solving problems, and the problem I want to dedicate my professional aptitude is to make understanding data easy and accessible by storytelling and visualization."
---

I am a Data Analyst working at [UF Health Integrated Data Repository](https://idr.ufhealth.org/). My work primarily focuses on designing and developing data science pipelines to improve the coverage and quality of the data, primarily for the [OneFlorida+ Clinical Research Consortium](https://onefloridaconsortium.org/). In my current role, I work on common data models like [OMOP](https://ohdsi.github.io/CommonDataModel/) and [PCORNET](https://pcornet.org/news/resources-pcornet-common-data-model/). Additionally, I also help research at UF by providing consultation for research teams, supporting feasibility and cohort discovery, and receiving and fulfilling research data requests.
